'''âd-z-ch''' ('''kadazach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultraheat|ultraheat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultraheat|ultraheat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-z-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kadazach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazach|thidazach]] || [[word:jidazach|jidazach]] || [[word:shidazach|shidazach]] || [[word:kidazach|kidazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazach|thuthudazach]] || [[word:jujudazach|jujudazach]] || [[word:shushudazach|shushudazach]] || [[word:kukudazach|kukudazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazach|thudazach]] || [[word:judazach|judazach]] || [[word:shudazach|shudazach]] || [[word:kudazach|kudazach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazach|thudazach]] || [[word:judazach|judazach]] || [[word:shudazach|shudazach]] || [[word:kudazach|kudazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazach|thedazach]] || [[word:jedazach|jedazach]] || [[word:shedazach|shedazach]] || [[word:kedazach|kedazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazach|thothodazach]] || [[word:jojodazach|jojodazach]] || [[word:shoshodazach|shoshodazach]] || [[word:kokodazach|kokodazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazach|thodazach]] || [[word:jodazach|jodazach]] || [[word:shodazach|shodazach]] || [[word:kodazach|kodazach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazach|thodazach]] || [[word:jodazach|jodazach]] || [[word:shodazach|shodazach]] || [[word:kodazach|kodazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdazach|thĂŠdazach]] || [[word:jĂŠdazach|jĂŠdazach]] || [[word:shĂŠdazach|shĂŠdazach]] || [[word:kĂŠdazach|kĂŠdazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazach|thathadazach]] || [[word:jajadazach|jajadazach]] || [[word:shashadazach|shashadazach]] || [[word:kakadazach|kakadazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazach|thadazach]] || [[word:jadazach|jadazach]] || [[word:shadazach|shadazach]] || [[word:kadazach|kadazach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazach|thadazach]] || [[word:jadazach|jadazach]] || [[word:shadazach|shadazach]] || [[word:kadazach|kadazach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadazach|shadazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadazach|goshadazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadazach|gokishadazach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadazachnĂŒ|shadazachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadazachnknĂŒ|goshadazachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazachnĂŒ|gokishadazachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadazachshĂ«|shadazachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadazachnkshĂ«|goshadazachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadazachshĂ«|gokishadazachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazachro|shadazachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazachnkro|goshadazachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazachro|gokishadazachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazachmu|shadazachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazachnkmu|goshadazachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazachmu|gokishadazachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadazachsher|shadazachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadazachnksher|goshadazachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadazachsher|gokishadazachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadazachng|shadazachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadazachnkng|goshadazachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadazachng|gokishadazachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadazachya|shadazachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadazachnkya|goshadazachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadazachya|gokishadazachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadazachyam|shadazachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadazachnkyam|goshadazachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadazachyam|gokishadazachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazachnĂŒshĂ«|shadazachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadazachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadazachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazachnĂŒro|shadazachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazachnknĂŒro|goshadazachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazachnĂŒro|gokishadazachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazachnĂŒmu|shadazachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazachnknĂŒmu|goshadazachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazachnĂŒmu|gokishadazachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazachshĂ«nĂŒ|shadazachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadazachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadazachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazachshĂ«ro|shadazachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazachnkshĂ«ro|goshadazachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazachshĂ«ro|gokishadazachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazachshĂ«mu|shadazachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazachnkshĂ«mu|goshadazachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazachshĂ«mu|gokishadazachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazachronĂŒ|shadazachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazachnkronĂŒ|goshadazachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazachronĂŒ|gokishadazachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazachroshĂ«|shadazachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazachnkroshĂ«|goshadazachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazachroshĂ«|gokishadazachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazachromu|shadazachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazachnkromu|goshadazachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazachromu|gokishadazachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazachmunĂŒ|shadazachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazachnkmunĂŒ|goshadazachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazachmunĂŒ|gokishadazachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazachmushĂ«|shadazachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazachnkmushĂ«|goshadazachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazachmushĂ«|gokishadazachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazachmuro|shadazachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazachnkmuro|goshadazachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazachmuro|gokishadazachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
